title: Changing dates on items not automatically changing dependent items
excerpt: I searched for this but maybe I didn’t use the right terms. I am shifting a timeline but am having to shift every single item instead of shifting the first item and having the dependencies automatically shift. Can anyone…

posts.author: Tholen (Brandon)
posts.cookedHtml: I searched for this but maybe I didn’t use the right terms. I am shifting a timeline but am having to shift every single item instead of shifting the first item and having the dependencies automatically shift. Can anyone provide assistance? Thanks in advance.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Tholen ,

Welcome to the monday community !

You should make sure you have chosen the strict setting on your dependency column.

image1264×752 70 KB

And also make sure you have made the necessary connections on your dependency column.

image954×446 28.3 KB

Let me know if you need any more help!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
